description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian dressed in urban winter attire, featuring a thick, puffy jacket with a high collar and visible zipper details. He wears a beanie hat and a pair of distinctive glasses with one red and one blue lens, giving a modern, streetwear-inspired look. Under the jacket, a loose sweatshirt is visible, paired with relaxed-fit jogger pants that have a subtle color block design. His footwear consists of chunky, high-top sneakers, adding to the contemporary urban style. The figure's hands are relaxed at his sides, and his facial hair is neatly groomed. The overall appearance suggests a fashionable city dweller prepared for cold weather.
description: A stylish adult male in winter streetwear, including a puffy jacket, beanie, jogger pants, and high-top sneakers, accessorized with unique glasses.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full outfit, glasses, beanie, and facial features clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the jacket's puffiness, side stripe, and sneaker profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the jacket, beanie, and pants, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the jacket's volume and sneaker details.
attribute_clothing_type: puffy winter jacket, beanie hat, loose sweatshirt, jogger pants, high-top sneakers
